ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to create a new BroadcastChannel, multi-tab state changes will not be available
ast.target: 创建新的 BroadcastChannel 失败，多标签页状态更改将不可用

ast.name: error
ast.target: 移除 visibilitychange 回调失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Auto refresh tick failed with error. This is likely a transient error.
ast.target: 自动刷新计时失败并出现错误。这很可能是一个临时性错误。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 解析 JSON 响应失败

ast.name: log
ast.source: Not reconnecting as page is hidden!

ast.name: log
ast.source: passing params to connect is deprecated. Instead pass :params to the Socket constructor
ast.target: 向 connect 传递参数已弃用。请改为将 :params 传递给 Socket 构造函数

ast.name: log
ast.source: heartbeat timeout. Attempting to re-establish connection
ast.target: 心跳超时。正在尝试重新建立连接

ast.name: log
ast.source: Error fetching access token from callback
ast.target: 从回调获取访问令牌失败

ast.name: log
ast.source: error waiting for auth on connect

ast.name: log
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: navigatorLock: acquire timeout, recovering by stealing lock
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: navigatorLock: 获取超时，通过窃取锁进行恢复

ast.name: log
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: navigatorLock: lock was stolen by another request
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: navigatorLock: 锁被另一个请求窃取

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of your solar system

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the star (leave blank to auto-assign)
ast.target: 恒星名称（留空则自动分配）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to sync (leave blank for entire vault)
ast.target: 要同步的文件夹（留空则同步整个保险库）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Realtime send() is automatically falling back to REST API. This behavior will be deprecated in the future. Please use httpSend() explicitly for REST delivery.
ast.target: 实时 send() 正在自动回退到 REST API。此行为将在未来弃用。请显式使用 httpSend() 进行 REST 交付。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WebCrypto API is not supported. Code challenge method will default to use plain instead of sha256.
ast.target: 不支持 WebCrypto API。代码质询方法将默认使用 plain 而非 sha256。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Error when querying Navigator LockManager state
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 查询 Navigator LockManager 状态时出错

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager returned a null lock when using #request without ifAvailable set to true, it appears this browser is not following the LockManager spec https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/LockManager/request
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager 在未设置 ifAvailable 为 true 的情况下使用 #request 时返回了空锁，看来此浏览器未遵循 LockManager 规范 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/LockManager/request

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager returned null lock even with steal: true
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 即使设置了 steal: true，Navigator LockManager 也返回了空锁

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued over 120s ago, URL could be stale
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 检索到的会话是在 120 秒前签发的，URL 可能已过时

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued in the future? Check the device clock for skew
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 检索到的会话是在未来签发的？请检查设备时钟是否有偏差

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to set initial Realtime auth token:
ast.target: 设置初始 Realtime 认证令牌失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️  Node.js 18 and below are deprecated and will no longer be supported in future versions of @supabase/supabase-js. Please upgrade to Node.js 20 or later. For more information, visit: https://github.com/orgs/supabase/discussions/37217
ast.target: ⚠️  Node.js 18 及以下版本已弃用，未来版本的 @supabase/supabase-js 将不再支持。请升级到 Node.js 20 或更高版本。更多信息，请访问：https://github.com/orgs/supabase/discussions/37217

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cosmos: please set a system name in settings.
ast.target: Cosmos：请在设置中设置一个系统名称。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Delete failed: owner secret did not match.
ast.target: 删除失败：所有者密钥不匹配。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cloudflare Workers detected. WebSocket clients are not supported in Cloudflare Workers.
ast.target: 检测到 Cloudflare Workers。Cloudflare Workers 不支持 WebSocket 客户端。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Edge runtime detected (Vercel Edge/Netlify Edge). WebSockets are not supported in edge functions.
ast.target: 检测到 Edge 运行时（Vercel Edge/Netlify Edge）。边缘函数不支持 WebSocket。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown JavaScript runtime without WebSocket support.
ast.target: 未知的 JavaScript 运行时，不支持 WebSocket。

ast.name: message
ast.source: JSON object requested, multiple (or no) rows returned
ast.target: 请求 JSON 对象，但返回了多行（或无）数据

ast.name: message
ast.source: Registration ceremony was sent an abort signal
ast.target: 注册仪式收到了中止信号

ast.name: message
ast.source: Discoverable credentials were required but no available authenticator supported it
ast.target: 需要可发现的凭据，但没有可用的认证器支持它

ast.name: message
ast.source: User verification was required during automatic registration but it could not be performed
ast.target: 自动注册期间需要用户验证，但无法执行

ast.name: message
ast.source: User verification was required but no available authenticator supported it
ast.target: 需要用户验证，但没有可用的验证器支持此操作

ast.name: message
ast.source: No entry in pubKeyCredParams was of type "public-key"
ast.target: pubKeyCredParams 中没有类型为 \"public-key\" 的条目

ast.name: message
ast.source: No available authenticator supported any of the specified pubKeyCredParams algorithms
ast.target: 没有可用的验证器支持任何指定的 pubKeyCredParams 算法

ast.name: message
ast.source: User ID was not between 1 and 64 characters
ast.target: 用户 ID 长度不在 1 到 64 个字符之间

ast.name: message
ast.source: The authenticator was unable to process the specified options, or could not create a new credential
ast.target: 验证器无法处理指定的选项，或无法创建新的凭据

ast.name: message
ast.source: a Non-Webauthn related error has occurred
ast.target: 发生了非 Webauthn 相关的错误

ast.name: message
ast.source: Authentication ceremony was sent an abort signal
ast.target: 认证仪式收到了中止信号

ast.name: message
ast.source: The authenticator was unable to process the specified options, or could not create a new assertion signature
ast.target: 验证器无法处理指定的选项，或无法创建新的断言签名

ast.name: text
ast.source: Only orbital metadata leaves your machine. Content is never sent.
ast.target: 只有轨道元数据会离开您的设备。内容永远不会被发送。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No system has been synced yet. Nothing to delete.
ast.target: 尚未同步任何系统。没有可删除的内容。
